title: A Phase 2 Trial of Intravesical Cabazitaxel, Gemcitabine, and Cisplatin (CGC) for the Treatment of Non-Muscle Invasive BCG Unresponsive Urothelial Carcinoma of the Bladder.
trial_name: Adjuvant Chemotherapy with Gemcitabine and Long-Term Outcomes Among Patients with Resected Pancreatic Cancer
